items.title: Arsenal sign Piero Hincapie on permanent deal
items.summary: Arsenal have confirmed they have activated an option to sign Piero Hincapié on a permanent deal.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: FIFA World Cup | Tunisia vs Netherlands LIVE updates: Group F match gets underway
items.summary: The Netherlands are unconcerned about ​potential knockout-stage opponents as they prepare ‌to face already-eliminated Tunisia in their ​final World Cup Group ⁠F match
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 2026 Special Olympics USA Games: How to watch, live updates and more
items.summary: The 2026 Special Olympics USA Games kicked off in Minneapolis on June 20, with nearly 3,000 athletes from all 50 states competing.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.
